name: Alone A Long
short_description: In a world where you are alone, you repeat your daily routine in a nonchalant and somewhat joyful manner. A simulation game to maintain civilization The objective is to maintain civilization until the day when you can no longer move.
detailed_description:
Summary

In a world where you are alone, you repeat your daily life in a nonchalant and somewhat joyful manner.

A simulation game about maintaining civilization.

Gameplay

The objective is to maintain civilization until the day when you can no longer move.

The player chooses the next action, and the character just repeats the action.

After time passes, things begin to fade away, but as long as they are repeated, they will remain.

Estimated playing time:

1 hour or less
